belongs_to_uuid.description: UUID of the server this aggregation belongs to

macs.description: MAC addresses of member NICs (colon-separated strings)

BelongsToType.description: What type of object owns this NIC

CreateAggregationBody.description: Request body for creating an aggregation (POST /aggregations)

CreateFabricNetworkBody.description:
Request body for creating a fabric network (POST /fabrics/:owner_uuid/vlans/:vlan_id/networks)

MTU, nic_tag, and vnet_id are auto-set from the VLAN.

internet_nat.description: Whether to enable internet NAT (default: true for IPv4)

CreateFabricVlanBody.description: Request body for creating a fabric VLAN (POST /fabrics/:owner_uuid/vlans)

CreateNetworkBody.description: Request body for creating a network (POST /networks)

fabric.description: Whether this is a fabric network

owner_uuids.description: UUIDs of owners who can provision on this network

subnet.description: Subnet CIDR (required unless subnet_alloc is true)

subnet_alloc.description: Whether to automatically allocate a subnet

subnet_prefix.description: Subnet prefix length for subnet allocation

CreateNetworkNicBody.description: Request body for provisioning a NIC on a specific network (POST /networks/:network_uuid/nics)

CreateNetworkPoolBody.description: Request body for creating a network pool (POST /network_pools)

owner_uuids.description: UUIDs of owners who can provision from this pool

CreateNicBody.description: Request body for creating a NIC (POST /nics)

ip.description: IP address to assign (auto-assigned if omitted)

CreateNicTagBody.description: Request body for creating a NIC tag (POST /nic_tags)

Error.description: Error response from a Node.js Triton service

request_id.description: Request ID for tracing (optional, not always present)

GcResponse.description: Response from the garbage collection endpoint (GET /manage/gc)

Ip.description: An IP address record within a network

belongs_to_type.description: Type of object this IP is assigned to (when assigned)

belongs_to_uuid.description: UUID of the object this IP is assigned to (when assigned)

network_uuid.description: UUID of the network this IP belongs to

oneOf.description: Catch-all for modes added after this client was compiled

MemoryUsage.description:
Node.js process.memoryUsage() snapshot

Note: `heapTotal` and `heapUsed` use camelCase because they come from Node.js `process.memoryUsage()` which returns camelCase field names.

oneOf.description: Catch-all for statuses added after this client was compiled

gateway_provisioned.description: Whether the gateway has been provisioned

internet_nat.description: Whether internet NAT is enabled (fabric networks only)

owner_uuid.description: Owner UUID (only present for fabric network serialization)

owner_uuids.description: UUIDs of owners who can provision on this network

oneOf.description: Catch-all for families added after this client was compiled

NetworkPool.description: A network pool (grouping of networks for provisioning)

nic_tag.description: Backwards compatibility: first NIC tag from nic_tags_present

nic_tags_present.description: NIC tags present across networks in this pool

owner_uuids.description: UUIDs of owners who can provision from this pool

gateway_provisioned.description: Whether the gateway has been provisioned

ip.description: IP address (present when NIC is on a network)

network_uuid.description: UUID of the network this NIC is on

primary.description: Whether this is the primary NIC

underlay.description: Whether this is an underlay NIC

subnet_alloc_enabled.description: Whether automatic subnet allocation is enabled

healthy.description: Whether the service is healthy overall

UpdateAggregationBody.description: Request body for updating an aggregation (PUT /aggregations/:id)

UpdateFabricNetworkBody.description: Request body for updating a fabric network (PUT /fabrics/:owner_uuid/vlans/:vlan_id/networks/:uuid)

UpdateFabricVlanBody.description: Request body for updating a fabric VLAN (PUT /fabrics/:owner_uuid/vlans/:vlan_id)

UpdateIpBody.description:
Request body for updating an IP (PUT /networks/:network_uuid/ips/:ip_addr)

Setting `free=true` triggers deletion (unassignment) of the IP rather than an update. The `unassign` parameter is mutually exclusive with `free`.

free.description: Set to true to free (unassign) this IP

unassign.description: Set to true to unassign this IP (mutually exclusive with `free`)

UpdateNetworkBody.description: Request body for updating a network (PUT /networks/:uuid)

UpdateNetworkPoolBody.description: Request body for updating a network pool (PUT /network_pools/:uuid)

UpdateNicBody.description: Request body for updating a NIC (PUT /nics/:mac)

UpdateNicTagBody.description: Request body for updating a NIC tag (PUT /nic_tags/:oldname)

name.description: New name for the NIC tag

info.description: Triton NAPI - internal HTTP API for managing networking resources in a Triton datacenter
